hero_h1: A pantry of icons, sourced direct.
hero_lede: Over thirty heritage Asian brands distributed under one roof. Direct manufacturer relationships keep pricing competitive and supply consistent — from AROY-D's Thai coconut milk to Singha's lager, from Healthy Boy's naturally-brewed soy to Mae Ploy's fifty-year-old sweet chilli.
spot_desc: Pure-pressed, no stabilisers, no preservatives. Trusted by Michelin chefs and 450+ UK kitchens. Available in 400ml, 1L UHT and catering-case sizes.

brands.name: AROY-D
brands.desc: The benchmark Thai coconut milk. Pure, no stabilisers — trusted by Michelin restaurants worldwide.

brands.name: Mae Ploy
brands.desc: Fifty years of Thai sweet chilli. The recipe hasn't changed — 100+ countries still pour it.

brands.name: Healthy Boy
brands.desc: Naturally brewed Thai soy sauce since 1947. The cooking soy that Bangkok kitchens swear by.

brands.name: Chaokoh
brands.desc: Premium Thai coconut products. Coconut milk, cream, lychee in syrup — reliable restaurant-grade.

brands.name: Singha
brands.desc: The original Thai beer. A nine-decade institution and a permanent fixture on UK Thai menus.

brands.name: Megachef
brands.desc: First-press anchovy fish sauce, fermented 12 months. The chef's-grade upgrade.

brands.name: Cock Brand
brands.desc: Authentic Thai curry pastes — green, red, yellow, massaman. Restaurant-pack, no shortcuts.

brands.name: Sriraja Panich
brands.desc: The original sriracha from Si Racha, Thailand. Not the American one — the real thing.

brands.name: Golden Mountain
brands.desc: Thai seasoning sauce — the umami undercurrent of Thai street food and restaurant kitchens.

brands.name: Por Kwan
brands.desc: Crab paste, fermented bean pastes, and traditional Thai pantry essentials.

brands.name: Yee Kwan
brands.desc: Asian-flavour ice cream made in the UK — black sesame, lychee, mango sticky rice, matcha.

brands.name: PFP
brands.desc: Fish cakes, seafood sets, and frozen Thai seafood — restaurant-grade, ready to fry.

brands.name: Wai Wai
brands.desc: Iconic Thai noodle brand — instant noodles, snack noodles, vermicelli.

brands.name: PA Foods
brands.desc: Paratha, baos, tofu puffs — frozen back-of-house staples for Asian kitchens.

brands.name: FOCO
brands.desc: Pure Thai coconut water, coconut juice with pulp, and tropical fruit drinks.

brands.name: Manora
brands.desc: Prawn crackers, taro chips, vegan alternatives — Thai snacks for restaurant sides.

brands.name: Chatramue
brands.desc: The original Thai tea blend — that iconic orange brew that defines Thai milk tea worldwide.

brands.name: Chang
brands.desc: Thailand's most-consumed beer. Crisp, light, the Thai street-food companion.

brands.name: Khaohom
brands.desc: Premium AAA-grade Thai jasmine rice. The fragrance you can't fake.

brands.name: Nittaya
brands.desc: Fresh Thai curry paste, no preservatives — the standard for authentic Thai restaurants.

brands.name: Bala 百樂
brands.desc: Malaysian-style sauces and pastes — for laksa, rendang, and sambal-led menus.

brands.name: Tsingtao
brands.desc: China's most internationally recognised lager — permanent presence on Chinese restaurant menus.

brands.name: Kwong Cheong Thye
brands.desc: Premium soy sauce from Singapore — naturally brewed, century-old recipes.

brands.name: Khun Jim
brands.desc: Authentic Thai pantry staples — pastes, dried herbs, and seasonings.
